running:
```yaml
participants_matrix:
  el:
    - el_type: geth
      el_image: ethpandaops/geth:epbs-devnet-0
  cl:

  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  preset: minimal

additional_services:
  - dora

snooper_enabled: true
global_log_level: debug

dora_params:
  image: ethpandaops/dora:gloas-support

```
